data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement 'Transfer bookings between locations', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the actual transfer of bookings. While the use case describes a scenario where appointments are auto-transferred, there is no concrete evidence of API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of the functionality to transfer bookings between locations.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for booking transfer
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the transfer of bookings between locations.
